why_they_bought: Runs a third-party maintenance-ticketing system that FleetOps' Maintenance Radar module pushes alerts to over an outbound webhook -- no legacy dispatch system is involved at all; no new cast authored here for the same reason as Cedar Valley.
legacy_system_note: No legacy system is named in canon for this account (Red Herring B). The third-party maintenance-ticketing system it runs today is a current integration target, not a replaced legacy system.
success_criteria: Reliable Maintenance Radar webhook delivery to the third-party ticketing system
